title: WYSIWYG editor annotation toolbar with structured annotation support
purpose: Provides a toolbar interface for adding and managing structured annotations in a Milkdown/ProseMirror editor, allowing users to mark text with comments, proposed changes, approvals, and rejections.
module_context: Exports a React component for the annotation toolbar, a toolbar button component, and a divider component. Defines interfaces for toolbar props and button props, and imports editor view, annotation schema, and anchor creation utilities.

steps.content: Render a button with the specified icon, title, and color styling.
Apply appropriate background and text color classes based on the color prop.
Attach the provided click handler and test ID to the button element.
Render a vertical divider element with specified styling.
Render the annotation toolbar UI with buttons for adding different types of annotations.
Set up click handlers for comment, propose, approve, reject, and clear actions.
Configure the toolbar with appropriate icons, titles, and color coding for each action.

methods.name: addAnnotation
methods.normalized_params: (kind: AnnotationKind, body: string, reason?: string): void

steps.content: Validate that the editor view is available and a text selection exists.
Create an anchor from the current selection within the document.
Construct a new annotation record with the specified kind, anchor, body, and timestamp.
IF a reason is provided, include it in the annotation.
Update the annotations array by appending the new annotation.
Prompt the user to enter a comment body.
IF the user cancels the prompt, return without creating an annotation.
Create a comment annotation with the entered body.
Create a proposed annotation with an empty body.
Create an approved annotation with an empty body.
Prompt the user to enter a rejection reason.
IF the user cancels the prompt, return without creating an annotation.
Create a rejected annotation with the entered reason.
Validate that the editor view is available and a text selection exists.
IF the selection is empty, clear all annotations from the document.
ELSE filter out annotations whose anchors intersect with the current selection.
Update the annotations array with the filtered results.
